mapper.sql: ,IFNULL(STTS_CD.CD_NM, B.BIZ_STTS_CD) AS BIZ_STTS_NM ,IFNULL(INST_CD.CD_NM, B.INST_SE_CD) AS INST_SE_NM ,IFNULL(KND_CD.CD_NM, B.BIZ_KND_CD) AS BIZ_KND_NM ,IFNULL(SE_CD.CD_NM, B.BIZ_SE_CD) AS BIZ_SE_NM ,IFNULL(GIVE_CD.CD_NM, B.GIVE_MTHD_CD) AS GIVE_MTHD_NM

LEFT JOIN cmn_cd STTS_CD ON STTS_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'BIZ_STTS_CD' AND STTS_CD.CD = B.BIZ_STTS_CD AND STTS_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN cmn_cd INST_CD ON INST_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'INST_SE_CD' AND INST_CD.CD = B.INST_SE_CD AND INST_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN cmn_cd KND_CD ON KND_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'BIZ_KND_CD' AND KND_CD.CD = B.BIZ_KND_CD AND KND_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN cmn_cd SE_CD ON SE_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'BIZ_SE_CD' AND SE_CD.CD = B.BIZ_SE_CD AND SE_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN cmn_cd GIVE_CD ON GIVE_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'GIVE_MTHD_CD' AND GIVE_CD.CD = B.GIVE_MTHD_CD AND GIVE_CD.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT B.BIZ_ID, B.CO_ID, B.BIZ_CD, B.BIZ_NM, B.INST_SE_CD, B.BIZ_KND_CD, B.BIZ_SE_CD, B.ORDPL_NM ,DATE_FORMAT(B.CTRT_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS CTRT_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.OTST_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS OTST_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(IFNULL(B.BIZ_BGNG_YMD, B.OTST_YMD), '%Y-%m-%d') AS BIZ_BGNG_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.BIZ_END_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS BIZ_END_YMD ,B.CTRT_AMT, B.GIVE_MTHD_CD, B.GIVE_MTHD_CN ,DATE_FORMAT(B.GIVE_DDT_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS GIVE_DDT_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.DFRP_GRNTE_BGNG_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DFRP_GRNTE_BGNG_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.DFRP_GRNTE_END_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS DFRP_GRNTE_END_YMD ,B.RMRK_CN, B.BIZ_STTS_CD ,DATE_FORMAT(B.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT
FROM biz_info B
ORDER BY B.BIZ_CD ASC, B.BIZ_ID ASC
LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{recordCountPerPage}
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(BIZ_CD, LENGTH(#{bizCdPrefix}) + 1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1 FROM biz_info WHERE BIZ_CD LIKE CONCAT(#{bizCdPrefix}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE cust_info SET USE_YN = 'N', MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = NOW() WHERE CUST_SN = #{custSn} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_cust_rel R WHERE R.CUST_SN = cust_info.CUST_SN AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT R.BIZ_CUST_REL_SN, R.BIZ_ID, R.CUST_SN, C.CUST_CO_NM, C.CUST_SE_CD ,C.BRNO, C.RPRSV_NM, C.TELNO, C.ADDR, C.DADDR ,IFNULL(CUST_CD.CD_NM, C.CUST_SE_CD) AS CUST_SE_NM ,R.REL_SE_CD, IFNULL(REL_CD.CD_NM, R.REL_SE_CD) AS REL_SE_NM ,R.REL_LVL, R.DIRECT_CTRT_YN, R.RMRK_CN FROM biz_cust_rel R INNER JOIN cust_info C ON C.CUST_SN = R.CUST_SN LEFT JOIN cmn_cd CUST_CD ON CUST_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'CUST_SE_CD' AND CUST_CD.CD = C.CUST_SE_CD AND CUST_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN cmn_cd REL_CD ON REL_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'REL_SE_CD' AND REL_CD.CD = R.REL_SE_CD AND REL_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE R.USE_YN = 'Y' AND R.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} ORDER BY R.REL_LVL ASC, R.BIZ_CUST_REL_SN ASC

SELECT M.BIZ_MNPW_SN, M.BIZ_ID, M.USER_ID, U.USER_NM ,M.INPUT_MNPW_NM, M.INPUT_SE_CD, IFNULL(INPUT_CD.CD_NM, M.INPUT_SE_CD) AS INPUT_SE_NM ,M.ROLE_NM, M.JBPS_NM ,DATE_FORMAT(M.INPUT_BGNG_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS INPUT_BGNG_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(M.INPUT_END_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS INPUT_END_YMD ,M.INPUT_MCNT, M.UNTPRC, M.RMRK_CN FROM biz_mnpw M LEFT JOIN user_info U ON U.USER_ID = M.USER_ID LEFT JOIN cmn_cd INPUT_CD ON INPUT_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'INPUT_SE_CD' AND INPUT_CD.CD = M.INPUT_SE_CD AND INPUT_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND M.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} ORDER BY M.INPUT_BGNG_YMD ASC, M.BIZ_MNPW_SN ASC

SELECT C.BIZ_CST_SN, C.BIZ_ID, C.CST_SE_CD, IFNULL(CST_CD.CD_NM, C.CST_SE_CD) AS CST_SE_NM ,C.CST_NM, C.OCRN_CST, DATE_FORMAT(C.OCRN_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS OCRN_YMD, C.RMRK_CN FROM biz_cst C LEFT JOIN cmn_cd CST_CD ON CST_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'CST_SE_CD' AND CST_CD.CD = C.CST_SE_CD AND CST_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} ORDER BY C.OCRN_YMD DESC, C.BIZ_CST_SN DESC

SELECT S.BIZ_SCHDL_SN, S.BIZ_ID, S.SCHDL_SE_CD, IFNULL(SCHDL_CD.CD_NM, S.SCHDL_SE_CD) AS SCHDL_SE_NM ,S.SCHDL_NM, S.SCHDL_CN ,DATE_FORMAT(S.SCHDL_BGNG_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS SCHDL_BGNG_YMD ,DATE_FORMAT(S.SCHDL_END_YMD, '%Y-%m-%d') AS SCHDL_END_YMD ,S.PIC_ID, U.USER_NM AS PIC_NM, S.RMRK_CN FROM biz_schdl S LEFT JOIN user_info U ON U.USER_ID = S.PIC_ID LEFT JOIN cmn_cd SCHDL_CD ON SCHDL_CD.CD_GROUP_ID = 'SCHDL_SE_CD' AND SCHDL_CD.CD = S.SCHDL_SE_CD AND SCHDL_CD.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE S.USE_YN = 'Y' AND S.BIZ_ID = #{bizId} ORDER BY S.SCHDL_BGNG_YMD ASC, S.BIZ_SCHDL_SN ASC

SELECT B.BIZ_ID, B.CO_ID, B.BIZ_CD, B.BIZ_NM, B.CTRT_AMT ,IFNULL(CST.DIRECT_CST_SUM, 0) AS DIRECT_CST_SUM ,IFNULL(MNPW.LABOR_CST_SUM, 0) AS LABOR_CST_SUM ,IFNULL(CST.DIRECT_CST_SUM, 0) + IFNULL(MNPW.LABOR_CST_SUM, 0) AS TOTAL_CST_SUM ,IFNULL(B.CTRT_AMT, 0) - (IFNULL(CST.DIRECT_CST_SUM, 0) + IFNULL(MNPW.LABOR_CST_SUM, 0)) AS PROFIT_AMT ,CASE WHEN IFNULL(B.CTRT_AMT, 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((IFNULL(B.CTRT_AMT, 0) - (IFNULL(CST.DIRECT_CST_SUM, 0) + IFNULL(MNPW.LABOR_CST_SUM, 0))) / B.CTRT_AMT * 100, 2) END AS PROFIT_RATE FROM biz_info B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BIZ_ID, SUM(IFNULL(OCRN_CST, 0)) AS DIRECT_CST_SUM FROM biz_cst WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY BIZ_ID ) CST ON CST.BIZ_ID = B.BIZ_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BIZ_ID, SUM(IFNULL(INPUT_MCNT, 0) * IFNULL(UNTPRC, 0)) AS LABOR_CST_SUM FROM biz_mnpw WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY BIZ_ID ) MNPW ON MNPW.BIZ_ID = B.BIZ_ID WHERE B.BIZ_ID = #{bizId}
